calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Charging Judgment Debtor'S Membership Interest In Wm Kasel Holdings Llc
Off Calendar Aug-28-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ISMAEL BASSO's Motion For An Order Charging Judgment Debtor'S Membership Interest In Wm Kasel Holdings Llc.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for order charging judgment debtor's membership is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-26-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing (Notices)
Off Calendar May-10-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for request for entry of judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 01:33:56 p.m. and concluding at 01:57:25 p.m.

Plaintiff Ismael Basso appearing represented by Nick Heimlich, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Wiliam Kasel not appearing.

ISMAEL BASSO is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.
Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. A (attached to Complaint) - Standard Promissory Note
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. C (attched to Supplemental Declaration of Ismael Basso filed May-05-2023) - Evidence of Wire Transfer on Feb-16-2021 to Wiliam Kasel in the sum of $200,000.00
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. A (attached to Declaration of Ismael Basso filed Feb-21-2023) - Amendment to Promissory Note)
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. B (attached to Declaration of Ismael Basso filed Feb-21-2023) - Amendment to Promissory Note)- Calculation of Damages - Breach of Amended Promissory Note

ISMAEL BASSO is examined by the Court. Witness attests that its Declarations filed on Feb-21-2023 and May-05-2023, the Declaration of Elena Rivkin filed Feb-21-2023, and comments made by its counsel are true and correct.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. B (attached to the Declaration of Elena Rivkin filed Feb-21-2023) - Amendment to Promissory Note - August 2021

Court determines the following:

1. Default against Defendant Wiliam Kasel was entered on Oct-04-2022
2. DOE Defendants DISMISSED on Nov-29-2022

The matter is submitted.
Based on the operative complaint, documents filed, the statements made by Plaintiff's witness and its Counsel, Declarations of Ismael Basso and Elena Ravkin, exhibits, facts, and claims, the Court finds Plaintiff has established causes of action alleged in the operative complaint. Defendant breached the terms of amended promissory note and failed to pay the amended sum of $218,687.03 by Aug-19-2021. Plaintiff's request for damages is supported by the evidence.

Plaintiff's request for pre-judgment interest is DENIED.
Court reduces attorney fees to $2,500.00.

After consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Ismael Basso, and against Defendant Wiliam Kasel, as follows:

1. Damages: $218,687.03
2. Attorney Fees: $2,500.00
3. Costs: $1,781.55

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $222,968.58
Proposed judgment signed.
